dict.string: Replacement DMAR table with Reserved Memory Regions stripped - requires DMAR table be dropped
Faked Embedded Controller - Needs EC _STA to XSTA renames ( no more )
Sets plugin-type to 1 on first Processor object
Defines PNLF device with a _UID of 19 for backlight control - requires PNLF to XNLF rename
Customized USBX device for USB power properties
Add MEM2 Instead of TPMX ( Disable if not working! )
_Q50 test ( abandon and will test later or never )
XOSI rename ( did i forget this shit )
MMIO devirt 0xFE000000 (0x11 pages - 68 KB) - Within 128 MB Threshold
MMIO devirt 0xFEC00000 (0x1 page - 4 KB) - Within 128 MB Threshold
MMIO devirt 0xFED00000 (0x4 pages - 16 KB) - Within 128 MB Threshold
MMIO devirt 0xFEE00000 (0x1 page - 4 KB) - Within 128 MB Threshold
MMIO devirt 0xFF000000 (0x1000 pages - 16 MB) - Within 128 MB Threshold
V1.0.6 | Fix Battery EC Read Limit
V1.0 | Required for using AirportItlwm in macOS 15.x (OCLP)
V1200.12.2b1 | Required for using AirportItlwm in macOS 15.x (OCLP)
V1400.1.1 | Not Required for using AirportItlwm in macOS 15.x (OCLP)
V2.3.0 | Intel WIFI for OCLP Patch ( Sequoia ) (OCLP)
V2.3.0 | WiFi kext for Tahoe (requires HeliPort) ( 26.2 not working ) (OCLP)
V2.7.1 | Bluetooth stack fix on macOS 12+
V1.1.7 | MT2 ( disabled to avoid conflict )
V1.1.6 | MT2 ( disabled to avoid conflict )
V1 | USB Wake fix ( optional and SSDT is not added )
V0.9.7 | Card Reader Fix Realtek ( will sometimes cause kp in sleep hlpr too )
V1.0.4 | Card Reader Fix Realtek ( Helper )
